response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior/mid role. Technical skills exceed requirements (TypeScript, React, Node, Kubernetes, AWS), but the seniority mismatch creates serious risk of dissatisfaction, salary misalignment, and short tenure. Berlin location is a fit, but the role's on-site requirement and junior scope are unlikely to retain a Staff-level candidate. PostgreSQL experience is also not evidenced (MongoDB is the listed relational/NoSQL background).
strengths: Strong TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS background well beyond required skills
Berlin-based, matching the on-site presence requirement
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, teaching
concerns: Severe seniority over-match — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level role
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience shown; relational DB background is thin (mostly MongoDB)
High flight risk: compensation expectations and scope of work unlikely to satisfy a 15+ year veteran
